name: Springtime Potatoes~ Sugar Snaps~ Herb Butter
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Small new potatoes (1 1/2 to 2 inches)
2 tsp Fresh basil, chopped OR 3/4 tsp dried basil
1 1/2 tsp Fresh thyme, chopped OR 1/2 tsp dried thyme
1 tsp Fresh tarragon, chopped OR 1/4 tsp dried tarragon
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the potatoes into halves or quarters.
2. Place in a medium saucepan with enough water to cover.
3. Bring to a boil; reduce heat and simmer, covered, until barely tender (about 10 minutes).
4. Add the peas; continue simmering uncovered for about 3 to 5 minutes until desired tenderness.
5. Transfer vegetables to a colander and drain well.
6. Discard water from saucepan.
7. Add butter; cook over medium heat until melted.
8. Stir in herbs, then return vegetables to pan.
9. Add salt and pepper; toss lightly to heat through.
4 Servings.
